Themes of Lore

A collection of custom Base16 themes inspired by the elements.

1Million base16 / dark & light Burning Ocean base16 / dark & light Cream Soda base16 / dark & light Deep Sea Synthwave base16 / dark & light Enchanted Midnight base16 / dark & light Frostbite Punch base16 / dark & light Funky Pigeon base16 / dark & light Girl Candy base16 / dark & light Green Tea & Cheesecake base16 / dark & light Maladaptive Tangerine base16 / dark & light Nature's Power base16 / dark & light Rusty Trombone base16 / dark & light Summer Fun base16 / dark & light Tango base16 / dark & light Taste of Italy base16 / dark & light Tropical Sorbet base16 / dark & light Twilight Harvest base16 / dark & light
